name: JSF++: Shall Violation Has Deviation
description: Any violation of a 'shall' rule is covered by an approved deviation.
rationale: JSF++ §4.2.1: 'shall' rules are mandatory requirements; a violation is permissible only through the formal deviation process.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
